Custom exception classes for handling specific errors in the Pulse2 module.

# Purpose
This code defines a set of custom exception classes for error handling in a Python application. The base class `PulseException` inherits from Python's built-in `Exception` class, and all other exceptions extend from `PulseException`. The specific exceptions include `TTYAutodetectionUnavailable`, `ReceiveQueueEmpty`, `TransportNotReady`, `SocketClosed`, and `AlreadyInProgressError`, each representing a distinct error condition that can occur within the application. The `AlreadyInProgressError` class includes a brief docstring to describe its purpose. This code provides narrow functionality focused on defining specific error types for use in a larger system.
